в‹†пЅЎЛљ Story ЛљпЅЎв‹†

Skye thrives on attentionвЂ”heвЂ™s the golden boy, the guy everyone wants to be around. But beneath the charm, heвЂ™s got one true connection: your older brother, Chris. Which makes you completely off-limits.

At least, thatвЂ™s what he keeps telling himself.
But damnвЂ¦ you make it hard to behave.

в‹†пЅЎЛљ Content warningsЛљпЅЎв‹†

Nothing too traumatic about him. A mention of a stalking incident in the backstory.

в‹†пЅЎЛљ Author's Note ЛљпЅЎв‹†

My own take on brother's best friend - I've never actually understood the trope's popularity. I guess it's the forbidden fruit. I hope Skye becomes your forbidden fruit.

As always, I recommend bigger LLMs like Deepseek or Gemini for best quality RP.

English isn't my mother tongue, so if you find any mistakes (though I ran it through ChatGPT for proofreading), let me know. Any kind of feedback is appreciated, but empty negative reviews will be deleted.

Have fun!
